'''Ryan Hampshire''' (born 29 December 1994) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|fb|sh}} or {{rlp|so}} for [[Hull KR]] in the [[Super League]], after a successful trial period at the club.

He has previously played for the [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[Super League]], and on loan from [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]] at [[Workington Town]] in the [[2015 RFL Championship|Kingstone Press Championship]] and the [[Castleford Tigers]] in the top flight. Hampshire has also played for the [[Leigh Centurions]] and finally [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] in the Super League.

==Background==
Hampshire was born in [[Wakefield]], [[West Yorkshire, England]].

Nicknamed "Rocky", he grew up supporting the [[Wakefield Trinity]],<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.pontefractandcastlefordexpress.co.uk/news/rocky-aiming-to-be-a-half-back-star-for-castleford-1-7696979|title='Rocky' aiming to be a half-back star for Castleford|publisher=Pontefract & Castleford Express|date=29 January 2016|accessdate=23 January 2018}}</ref> and played for the Normanton Knights as a junior.

==Career==
In December 2017, he signed with Wakefield Trinity for the 2018 season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/42403950|title=Ryan Hampshire: Wakefield Trinity sign versatile Leigh Centurions back|publisher=BBC Sport|date=18 December 2017|accessdate=23 January 2018}}</ref> Hampshire joined [[Wigan Warriors]] in January 2023<ref>{{cite web|url=https://wiganwarriors.com/blog/2023/01/27/hampshire-signs-for-wigan/|title=Hampshire signs for Wigan|publisher=Wigan Warriors|accessdate=4 October 2024}}</ref> and played for the club until October 2024.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cd6qx4dp713o|title=Hampshire to leave Wigan as Isa extends stay|publisher=BBC Sport|accessdate=4 October 2024}}</ref>

===Featherstone Rovers===
On 8 March 2025 it was reported that Hampshire had signed for [[Featherstone Rovers]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=8 Mar 2025|author=Aaron Bower|title=Ryan Hampshire lands new club with move to Championship title hopefuls|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/ryan-hampshire-lands-new-club-with-move-to-championship-title-hopefuls}}</ref>

===Hull KR===
On 15 March 2026 he turned out for [[Hull KR|Hull KR Reserves]] v [[Hull FC|Hull FC Reserves]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=15 Mar 2026|author=Aaron Bower|title=Ryan Hampshire’s Hull KR situation explained after surprise reserve appearance|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/ryan-hampshire-hull-kr-transfer}}</ref>

On 2 April 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in the [[Super League]] after a successful trial period.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=2 Apr 2026|author=Matthew Shaw|title=Ryan Hampshire secures Super League return with new club announced|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/ryan-hampshire-secures-super-league-return-with-new-club-announced}}</ref>
